channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [PALCO] Palco Metals clarifies no undisclosed info behind price surge
item.description:
Palco Metals Ltd responded to a query from BSE regarding a significant increase in its share volume and price. The company confirmed that it has made prompt disclosures of all price-sensitive information as per Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligation and Disclosure Requirement) Regulations, 2015. Palco Metals stated that there is no significant, price-sensitive information or event that the company needs to disseminate to investors to explain the recent market activity.

  • Palco Metals responded to BSE query on share price movement.
  • Company confirms no undisclosed price-sensitive information.
  • All regulatory disclosures made promptly as per SEBI.
  • No specific event explains recent volume/price increase.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Palco Metals Ltd | Category: Clarification

item.title: [IIFLWAM] 360 ONE WAM: Tax Demand of ₹192.42 Cr, Subsidiary ₹143.72 Cr
item.description:
🔥 Trending

360 ONE WAM LTD and its wholly-owned subsidiary, 360 ONE PRIME LIMITED, received assessment orders from the Joint Commissioner of Income Tax, raising tax demands under section 158BC(1)(c) of the Income Tax Act, 1961. The tax demand for 360 ONE WAM LIMITED is ₹192.42 crores, and for the subsidiary, it is ₹143.72 crores (including surcharge and cess). The companies believe they have discharged all tax liabilities and will appeal the orders, expecting no material financial impact.

  • 360 ONE WAM faces a tax demand of ₹192.42 Cr from IT Authority.
  • Subsidiary 360 ONE PRIME faces a tax demand of ₹143.72 Cr.
  • The demands are under section 158BC(1)(c) of the Income Tax Act, 1961.
  • Companies will appeal the orders and foresee no material financial impact.
  • The assessment period is from April 1, 2018, to March 27, 2025.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: 360 One Wam Ltd | Category: Tax & Penalty

item.title: [MAHEPC] Mahindra EPC Board Approves FY26 Results, AGM, Director & Auditor Changes
item.description:
Mahindra EPC Irrigation Ltd's Board of Directors met on April 21, 2026, to approve the Audited Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, with an unmodified opinion from B S R & Associates LLP. The Board also announced the 44th Annual General Meeting (AGM) to be held on May 29, 2026, with the record date set from May 25-29, 2026. Significant management changes were approved, including the re-appointment of Mr. Ramesh Ramachandran as Managing Director, and the appointment of Dr. Purvi Mehta and Mr. Balram Singh Yadav as Additional Non-Executive Independent Directors. Mr. Madhvendra Pratap Singh was appointed as Company Secretary and Compliance Officer, replacing Mr. Ratnakar Nawghare. Furthermore, the Board approved material Related Party Transactions and the re-appointment of B S R & Co. LLP as Statutory Auditors, along with the appointment of Mr. K N Vaidyanathan as Internal Auditor. An application to SEBI for contravention of RPT regulations was also proposed.

  • Board approved FY26 Audited Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results.
  • 44th Annual General Meeting scheduled for May 29, 2026.
  • Ramesh Ramachandran re-appointed MD; new Independent Directors appointed.
  • Madhvendra Singh appointed Company Secretary; Ratnakar Nawghare ceases.
  • B S R & Co. LLP re-appointed Statutory Auditors; new Internal Auditor appointed.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Mahindra EPC Irrigation Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [NATIONALUM] NALCO Board to meet on April 30, 2026 for Q4/FY26 results
item.description:
National Aluminium Company Ltd (NALCO) has announced that its Board of Directors will convene on Thursday, April 30, 2026. The primary agenda for this meeting is to consider and approve the Audited (Standalone & Consolidated) Financial Results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. In accordance with SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015, the trading window for the company's shares has been closed from April 1, 2026, and will reopen on May 2, 2026.

  • Board meeting scheduled for April 30, 2026.
  • To consider and approve Q4 and FY26 audited financial results.
  • Trading window closed from April 1 to May 2, 2026.
  • Announcement made in compliance with SEBI (LODR) Regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NATIONAL ALUMINIUM CO.LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [FOODSIN] Foods & Inns Promoter Rekha Dalal De-Pledges 5.4 Lakh Shares (0.74%)
item.description:
Foods & Inns Ltd promoter, Rekha Dalal, has disclosed the release of encumbrance on 540,000 equity shares, equivalent to 0.74% of the company's total paid-up share capital. These shares were previously pledged with Tata Capital Limited. The event occurred on April 20, 2026, and was reported to the stock exchanges on April 21, 2026. Prior to this de-pledging, Rekha Dalal had 2,274,000 shares (3.10%) encumbered. This action reduces the overall percentage of promoter shares under encumbrance.

  • Foods & Inns promoter Rekha Dalal de-pledged 540,000 shares.
  • This represents 0.74% of the company's total share capital.
  • The shares were previously pledged with Tata Capital Limited.
  • The de-pledging reduces the promoter's encumbered shareholding.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: FOODS & INNS LTD. | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [PERSISTENT] Persistent Systems Board Approves FY26 Results, Recommends ₹18 Dividend
item.description:
Persistent Systems' Board of Directors met on April 21, 2026, and approved the Audited Financial Results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The company's Statutory Auditors issued an unmodified opinion on both consolidated and standalone financial results. Additionally, the Board recommended a final dividend of ₹18 per equity share (face value ₹5) for the Financial Year 2025-26. This dividend recommendation is subject to shareholder approval at the upcoming 36th Annual General Meeting, with the record date to be announced later.

  • Board approved Audited Financial Results for Q4 and FY26.
  • Statutory Auditors issued an unmodified opinion on results.
  • Final dividend of ₹18 per share recommended for FY26.
  • Dividend is subject to shareholder approval at the AGM.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PERSISTENT SYSTEMS LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [GARUDA] Garuda Construction appoints Dhruti Harsh Satia as Independent Director
item.description:
Garuda Construction and Engineering Ltd's Board of Directors, following the Nomination and Remuneration Committee's recommendation, has approved the appointment of Mrs. Dhruti Harsh Satia (DIN: 11670095) as a Non-Executive Independent Director (Additional Director). Her appointment is effective from April 21, 2026, and will last until the next General Meeting or until her regularization by members, whichever comes first. Mrs. Satia holds a Bachelor of Commerce degree and is an Associate Member of the Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI) since 2015. She has prior experience as a Company Secretary for Mercury Trade Links Limited and as an Assistant Company Secretary for Essel Finance Wealth Zone Private Limited. The company confirmed that Mrs. Satia meets the independence criteria as per the Companies Act, 2013, and SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015, and is not related to any other director or debarred by SEBI.

  • Garuda Construction appointed Mrs. Dhruti Harsh Satia as an Independent Director.
  • Her appointment is effective from April 21, 2026.
  • She is a qualified Company Secretary with prior experience.
  • Mrs. Satia meets all independence criteria for the role.
  • She is not related to any other director of the company.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Garuda Construction and Engineering Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [KAJARIACER] Kajaria Ceramics Appoints Ipininder Singh as Group CDIO
item.description:
Kajaria Ceramics Ltd. announced the appointment of Mr. Ipininder Singh as the Group Chief Digital and Information Officer (CDIO), effective April 23, 2026. Mr. Singh holds an MBA from IIT Delhi and a B. Tech in Electrical Engineering, bringing over 24 years of experience in driving enterprise transformation through digital innovation, with prior roles at Havells India, Convergys India, and Dalmia Bharat. Concurrently, Mr. Atul Nigam, VP (IT), will cease to be a Senior Management Personnel from the same date due to a change in reporting structure. However, Mr. Nigam will continue in his role as VP (IT) and will report to the newly appointed Group CDIO. This strategic move underscores the company's commitment to enhancing its digital capabilities and information technology leadership.

  • Kajaria Ceramics appointed Ipininder Singh as Group CDIO.
  • Appointment effective April 23, 2026, to drive digital innovation.
  • Mr. Singh has over 24 years of experience in digital transformation.
  • Atul Nigam ceases as Senior Management but remains VP (IT).
  • The change reflects a strategic focus on digital leadership.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KAJARIA CERAMICS LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [IXIGO] Schroder IM (Singapore) reduces stake in Le Travenues Tech
item.description:
Schroder Investment Management (Singapore) Ltd, part of The Schroders Group entities, has disclosed a reduction in its shareholding in Le Travenues Technology Ltd. The disclosure, made under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, indicates that their holding decreased by more than 2% of the last disclosed position following an acquisition of shares on April 17, 2026. This change reflects a significant movement by a major institutional investor.

  • Schroder Investment Management (Singapore) disclosed a stake reduction.
  • Holding in Le Travenues Technology decreased by over 2%.
  • Disclosure made under SEBI Takeover Regulations 29(2).
  • The transaction occurred on April 17, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Le Travenues Technology Ltd | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [SHAKTIPR] Suresh Kumar Sharma sells 0.244% stake in Shakti Press Ltd
item.description:
Suresh Kumar Sharma disclosed the sale of 8,583 equity shares of Shakti Press Ltd. This transaction, executed via the open market on April 21, 2026, represents 0.244% of the company's total equity capital. Following the sale, Sharma's holding in Shakti Press Ltd decreased from 2.783% (97,984 shares) to 2.539% (89,401 shares). The disclosure was made under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

  • Suresh Kumar Sharma sold 8,583 equity shares of Shakti Press Ltd.
  • The sale reduced his stake by 0.244% through open market.
  • Post-transaction, his holding stands at 2.539% of total equity.
  • The disclosure was made under SEBI Takeover Regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SHAKTI PRESS LTD. | Category: Shareholding
